title: glossostelma xysmalobioides
intro: Glossostelma xysmalobioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Glossostelma xysmalobioides include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Glossostelma xysmalobioides can be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments, and are often used in traditional African medicine.
